chat.guest: Good evening! Do you still have a room for two nights this Friday?
chat.agent: Of course! A double room overlooking the garden is available. Shall I reserve it for you?

scenarios.guest: Hi, this is Nina — are you open on Sundays too?
scenarios.agent: Yes, Nina — Sundays 10 am to 6 pm. Shall I book you a slot?
Hello Sabine — an MRI slot is free Thursday at 2:30 pm. Would you like it?
scenarios.agentFollowUp: All set — I've booked it for you.

scenarios.guest: Hi, this is Elena — where's my food, order #CGH6P8?
scenarios.agent: Elena, order #CGH6P8 is on the way — about eight minutes.

scenarios.guest: Hi, this is Anna — do you still have a table for 2 at 7:30 tonight? And parking?
scenarios.agent: Yes, Anna — 7:30 works, parking right outside.

scenarios.guest: Hi, this is Mia — I'd like to get my hair colored.
scenarios.agent: Of course, Mia! Sandra or Tom — and when?
scenarios.agentFollowUp: All set — appointment with Sandra is booked.

scenarios.title: Sailly in real hotel scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Listen to Sailly guide guests through reservations, check-in and service requests.

items.title: Book a room
items.desc: A guest calls to book a weekend stay — Sailly checks availability and confirms.
items.guest: Good evening! Do you have a room for two nights this Friday?
items.agentGreeting: Good evening! How can I help you?
items.agent: Of course! A double room with garden view is available. Shall I reserve it for you?

items.title: Late check-out
items.desc: A guest asks for late check-out before an evening flight.
items.guest: Can we stay in the room until 2 pm tomorrow? Our flight is in the evening.
items.agent: Yes, late check-out until 2 pm is available. I'll add that for you right away.

items.title: Breakfast & service
items.desc: A guest asks about breakfast hours and extra towels — Sailly answers instantly.
items.guest: What time is breakfast? And could we get two extra towels, please?
items.agent: Breakfast is from 7 to 10:30 am. Housekeeping will bring the towels shortly.

items.title: Parking & arrival
items.desc: A guest plans their arrival and needs parking and check-in info.
items.guest: Is there parking? And can we check in at 11 am?
items.agent: Yes, underground parking is €18 per night. Early check-in at 11 am is available today.

hotels.tab_title: Sailly – No Missed Bookings. Your Guests Get the Attention They Deserve.

hero.title: More Time for Your Guests, Less on the Phone.
hero.subtitle: Let Sailly take reservations while you're the perfect host. No ringing in the dining room, no no-shows.

restaurants.agent_line_2: We look forward to seeing you — see you soon.

items.title: The Perfect Host
items.desc: Nothing disrupts service more than a ringing phone. Stay completely with your guests at the table.

items.title: Reliable Reservations
items.desc: End the paper chaos and misunderstandings in table allocation.

items.title: Noise & Hectic
items.desc: In full operation, telephoning is difficult. Sailly always understands your guests crystal clear.

items.title: Smart Reservations
items.desc: Connects with OpenTable, Resmio and other systems for automatic table bookings.

items.title: No-Show Reduction
items.desc: Sends reminders and confirmations so reserved tables are actually occupied.

items.title: Allergen & Menu Information
items.desc: Answers questions about ingredients and daily specials competently and safely.

scenarios.title: Sailly in real restaurant scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Listen to Sailly handle reservations, menu questions and takeaway orders.

items.title: Reserve a table
items.desc: A guest books a table for four while the dining room is full.
items.guest: Do you have a table for four this Saturday at 7 pm?
items.agent: Yes, we still have availability. Shall I reserve the table for you?

items.title: Allergens & menu
items.desc: A guest asks about gluten-free options before booking.
items.guest: My partner is gluten-free — what would you recommend?
items.agent: We have several gluten-free dishes, including today's special. Shall I note that with your reservation?

items.title: Opening hours
items.desc: A caller wants to know if kitchen and bar are open today.
items.guest: Are you open for lunch today? And how long does the kitchen serve?
items.agent: Yes, we open at 11:30 am. Kitchen serves until 2:30 pm and again until 10 pm.

items.title: Takeaway order
items.desc: A regular orders two pasta dishes for pickup at 6:30 pm.
items.guest: Can I order two pasta dishes for pickup at half past six?
items.agent: Sure! Tagliatelle and pesto pasta — pickup at 6:30 pm. Does that work?

restaurants.tab_title: Sailly – No Missed Reservations. You Stay in the Dining Room.

scenarios.title: Sailly in real practice scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Listen to Sailly guide patients through appointments, prescriptions and office hours.

items.title: Book an appointment
items.desc: A patient needs an appointment — lines are busy, Sailly picks up.
items.guest: Can we come in tomorrow morning to see the doctor?
items.agentGreeting: Good morning, Dr. Weber's practice. How can I help?
items.agent: Yes, there are slots tomorrow morning. Does 8:30 or 9:00 am work?

items.title: Order a prescription
items.desc: A patient requests a repeat prescription — Sailly captures it structured.
items.guest: I'd like a repeat prescription for my blood pressure medication, please.
items.agent: Of course. I've noted Ramipril 5 mg. Pickup available from 10 am tomorrow.

items.title: Office hours
items.desc: A caller asks about hours and whether the practice is open today.
items.guest: What are your hours today? I need to stop by briefly.
items.agent: Today until 6 pm. Morning 8–12, afternoon 2–6 for prescriptions without appointment.

items.title: Urgent case
items.desc: Sailly recognizes urgency and forwards to the practice team.
items.guest: My child has had a high fever since yesterday — can we come in today?
items.agent: That sounds urgent. I'll connect you with the practice assistant right away.

scenarios.title: Sailly in real law firm scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Listen to Sailly guide clients through initial consultations, appointments and callbacks.

items.title: Book initial consultation
items.desc: A client wants to schedule an initial tax advisory meeting.
items.guest: I'd like an initial consultation about forming a GmbH. When is something available?
items.agent: Happy to help. Thursday at 2 or 4 pm is available. Which works better?

items.title: Schedule a callback
items.desc: A client requests a callback — Sailly captures concern and urgency.
items.guest: Could you call me back? It's about a tax assessment notice.
items.agent: Of course. I'll note your request — callback today before 5 pm.

items.title: Request documents
items.desc: A client asks what to bring to the initial consultation.
items.guest: What should I bring to the first meeting? I already have the articles of association.
items.agent: Please bring ID, articles of association and your latest tax documents.

items.title: Reschedule appointment
items.desc: A client moves an appointment — Sailly updates the calendar.
items.guest: Can we move Thursday's appointment to Friday morning?
items.agent: Yes, Friday at 10 am is free. I'll update that for you.

messages.message: Done! See you tomorrow at 3:15 PM.

security_compliance_page.subtitle: Your data is safe with us. Highest security standards and comprehensive data protection.
security_compliance_page.f1_desc: End-to-end encryption for data in transit and at rest. AES-256.
security_compliance_page.f2_desc: Granular permissions and role management. SSO, MFA and Identity Provider.
security_compliance_page.f3_desc: Complete audit logs for all actions. Traceability and compliance.
security_compliance_page.f4_desc: Secure cloud infrastructure or on-premise deployment. Your choice.
security_compliance_page.f5_desc: Automatic threat detection. DDoS protection, firewall.
security_compliance_page.f6_desc: Automatic backups and disaster recovery. Guaranteed data availability.
security_compliance_page.comp_subtitle: Meeting all important standards and regulations
security_compliance_page.dp_desc: Full compliance with data protection regulations.
security_compliance_page.cert_desc: Internationally recognized security and quality standards.
security_compliance_page.dr_desc: Choose where your data is stored. EU, USA or on-premise.
security_compliance_page.dm_desc: We only collect the data necessary for the service.
security_compliance_page.del_desc: Full control over your data. Deletion on request.
security_compliance_page.cta_subtitle: Learn more about our security measures and compliance standards.

workflow_builder_page.subtitle: Create complex workflows with our intuitive drag-and-drop builder. No programming required.

workflow_builder_page.f1_desc: Intuitive drag-and-drop interface. Create workflows by simply dragging components.

workflow_builder_page.f3_desc: Test your workflows directly in the builder. Instant feedback and debugging.
workflow_builder_page.f4_desc: Advanced functionality with built-in code editor for custom logic.
workflow_builder_page.f5_desc: Full version control for all workflows. Rollback and comparison.
workflow_builder_page.f6_desc: Automatic validation and error checking during creation.
workflow_builder_page.t1_desc: Templates for automatic document processing, OCR and classification.
workflow_builder_page.t2_desc: Connect systems and synchronize data automatically.
workflow_builder_page.t3_desc: Use AI for intelligent automation and decisions.
